articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 13)
articles.description:
ACTON 96 Newtown Road. One-family Colonial, built in 2021, 3,489 square feet, 9 rooms, 4 bedrooms, 4 baths, on 43,585-square-foot lot. $1,790,000 87 Canterbury Hill Road. One-family Colonial, built in 2008, 4,265 square feet, 9 rooms, 4 bedrooms, 4 baths, on 24,475-square-foot lot. $1,785,000 127 Main St. Condo, on 23,101-square-foot lot. $360,000 15 Davis Road […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (May 13) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Acton home at 96 Newtown Road sold for $1,790,000 on May 13.
87 Canterbury Hill Road sold for $1,785,000, reflecting strong demand in the area.
Recent sales indicate rising property values, affecting housing affordability for Boston residents.
